title: Language Change - "Later" button
scenario: Tapping "Later" on firmware update prompt after changing device language in Poly Studio Mobile app dismisses language list without applying the new language
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or Account icon to access Settings.
Locate and tap the 'Language' option to open the language selection list.
Select a new language from the list (different from the current one).
Observe that a firmware update prompt appears on the screen.
On the firmware update prompt, tap the 'Later' button.
expected: The language list is dismissed, the language is NOT changed, and the previously selected language remains displayed and active.
